case_title: CLIFFORD S. RAE VS. RENEE GIBBONS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RAE, CLIFFORD S. AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBONS, RENEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAE, CLIFFORD S. AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBONS, RENEE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBONS, RENEE
DEFENDANT FILED SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER. ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A): THE REQUEST IS DENIED. OTHER ORDERS: DENIED W/O PREJUDICE TO REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL AT TIME OF TRIAL; REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL SHALL BE CONSIDERED AT TIME OF TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2007 BY COMM PAUL SLAVIT; FANNY RAYRAY CLERK. NOT REPORTED IN (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAE, CLIFFORD S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIBBONS, RENEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
